posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: #八大基本排序 冒泡排序 public static void bubbleSort(int[] arr) { boolean flag = false; for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) { for (int j = 0; j < arr.length - 1 - i; j++) { if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1]) { exchange(arr, j, j + 1); flag = true; } } if (flag) { flag = false; } else { break; } } }选择排序public static void selectSort(int[] arr) { for (int i = 0; i < arr.length - 1; i++) { int min = arr[i]; int minIndex = i; for (int j = i + 1; j < arr.length; j++) { if (min > arr[j]) { min = arr[j]; minIndex = j; } } if (minIndex != i) { exchange(arr, minIndex, i); } } }插入排序for (int i = 1; i < arr.length; i++) { for (int j = i; j > 0; j--) { if (arr[j] < arr[j - 1]) { exchange(arr, j, j - 1); } } }希尔排序public static void shellSort(int[] arr) { for (int gap = (arr.length - 1) / 2; gap >= 1; gap /= 2) { for (int i = gap; i < arr.length; i++) { for (int j = i; j > gap - 1; j -= gap) { if (arr[j] < arr[j - gap]) { exchange(arr, j, j - gap); } } } } }快速排序public static void quickSort(int[] arr, int start, int end) { if (start>=end){ return; } int left = start; int right =end; int pivot = arr[left]; while (left<=right&&arr[left]<pivot){ left++; } while (left<=right&&arr[right]>pivot){ right--; } if (left<=right){ exchange(arr,left++,right--); } quickSort(arr,start,right); quickSort(arr,left,end); }归并排序public static void mergeSort(int[] arr, int left, int right, int[] temp) { if (left >= right) { return; }//只有拆成一个元素的时候才开始合并。秒啊 int mid = (left + right) / 2; mergeSort(arr, left, mid, temp); mergeSort(arr, mid + 1, right, temp); merge(arr, left, mid, right, temp); } private static void merge(int[] arr, int left, int right, int mid, int[] temp) { int start = left; int end = mid+1; int t = left; while (start<=mid&&end<=right){ if (arr[start]<=arr[end]){ temp[t++]=arr[start++]; }else { temp[t++]=arr[end++]; } } while (start<=mid){ temp[t++]=arr[start++]; } while (end<=right){ temp[t++]=arr[end++]; } for (int i =left;i<=right;i++) { arr[i]=temp[i]; } }堆排序基数排序

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
